mapper.select:
SELECT TM.MEMBER_ID, TM.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, TMD.MEMBER_NM, TM.USE_YN, TM.AUTH_CD, TO_CHAR(TM.REG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT FROM TM_MEMBER TM, TM_MEMBER_DT TMD, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE TM.MEMBER_ID = TMD.MEMBER_ID AND TM.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID
AND TM.COMPANY_ID = #{COMPANY_ID}
AND TM.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{MEMBER_ID} || '%'
ORDER BY TM.COMPANY_ID, TM.MEMBER_ID
